Bug / Task Description: The consistent-hash ring's binary search in Lookup and LookupN uses a strict greater-than comparison instead of greater-than-or-equal. When a key hashes to a value that exactly matches a virtual node position, the ring wraps to the next node rather than landing on the correct one, producing a deterministic but wrong mapping for a small fraction of keys. Fix both Lookup and LookupN so that keys whose hash equals a virtual node position are assigned to that node.
Commit Subject: fix(hash): use >= in ring binary search to correctly handle exact hash matches
